sourceTitle: Guidelines and Policies | HKUST CEI | Center for Education Innovation
evidenceSnippetOriginal: HKUST allows faculty members the flexibility to set their own course-level policies. Faculty members are required to communicate the chosen policy option to students in writing for courses offered starting Fall 2023-24.
evidenceLocator: Policy for GenAI Integration in Teaching and Learning section
